otherAspects.safety: Handling of DEZ, B₂H₆, and H₂O requires careful control due to their toxicity and flammability.
UV-irradiation and boron doping require careful handling of DEZ, B₂H₆, and H₂O due to toxicity and flammability.
UV-irradiation and boron doping cycles with B₂H₆ require careful handling of DEZ, B₂H₆, and H₂O.
